Theme - Class in com.lulow.justtype.view
Central color palette and hex-conversion utility for the application's visual theme.

Default no-op adapter for ITimer.

Renders a circular arc indicator that shrinks as the countdown timer decreases.

Creates and configures the timer arc and its container group.

Validates the player's answer when the timer runs out.
